channel.title: Definitions on Zymacs
channel.description: Recent content in Definitions on Zymacs

item.title: What is a Computer?
item.description: What is a computer? While talking about what interview questions I’d been studying, I mentioned to a non technical friend how interesting it was finding questions so basic included. Why would you ask a Software Engineering graduate to define a computer? Such a waste of time right? My friend’s response was even more interesting: “What is a computer?” he posed the question to me. And there I was… answering my own question.
